task: Fix extension zip, API key persistence, extension connect panel, Instagram wiring, Instagram CSS, GIF sizing/click-to-open

extensionZip.summary: Fixed CRC/header alignment bug in package-hades-extension.mjs — local and central directory headers had 2-byte CRC shift. Zip now extracts correctly (11 files, 4720 bytes, all deflate method 8).

extensionKeyPersistence.summary: extensionKeyRepository now supports Supabase persistence via hydrate/persist pattern. Created migration 005_hades_extension_keys.sql. Wired supabaseClient in index.js. 6/6 TDD tests pass.

extensionConnectPanel.summary: HadesExtensionApp.jsx now imports getApiKey/setApiKey from hadesExtensionClient.js, persists key on connect via useEffect + handleConnect async function. Auto-connects if key exists in storage.

instagramWiring.summary: SocialsScreen useEffect now handles instagram provider from getSocialConnections response. Added else-if branch for instagram.

instagramCSS.summary: Added .instagram-card flex layout (matching telegram/discord/github cards) and .social-footer full-width styling. Added to responsive media query.

gifSizing.summary: Added .chat-gif CSS: max-width:100%, max-height:300px, cursor:pointer, object-fit:contain, border-radius:12px. Added onClick handler to open GIF in new tab via window.open.
